NAVAREA XIX 56/25

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  231830 UTC MAY 25
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 72-24.00N 020-08.00E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 71-14.60N 022-14.90E COSL PROSPECTOR
 66-34.60N 006-05.60E DEEPSEA BOLSTA
 66-00.10N 008-01.90E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-30.80N 007-29.20E DEEPSEA YANTAI

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　55/25
